Video.summary: Adrianna says her ex-fiancé is verbally and physically abusive, but he says he had every right to treat her that way to put her in her place.
Video.title: She Deserves It

Image.alt: She Deserves It
She Deserves It
She Deserves It

Video.summary: Paternity test results could keep Cortez and Mallory's family together or tear them asunder.
Video.title: Confession Leads to Stunning Reactions

Image.alt: Confession Leads to Stunning Reactions
Confession Leads to Stunning Reactions
Confession Leads to Stunning Reactions

Video.summary: Kandie was the guardian of Katie’s son who died at only 9 months. Katie thinks that Kandie was involved with his death, but Kandie claims she cared more for him than Katie did and even accuses her of selling him for $23 to her! Who’s responsible for the tragic death of the child?
Video.title: She Sold Her Baby for $23

Image.alt: She Sold Her Baby for $23
She Sold Her Baby for $23
She Sold Her Baby for $23

Video.summary: Gloria thinks her sister's apparent drug-overdose death was not an accident, and that her other sister may be responsible.
Video.title: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Image.alt: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Video.summary: Tamara's man quit his job, but, inexplicably, still has money coming in, and she thinks she knows why; Rainy says she caught her boyfriend responding to ads for sex with men and transsexuals.
Video.title: Prove You're Not Having Sex for Money

Image.alt: Prove You're Not Having Sex for Money
Prove You're Not Having Sex for Money
Prove You're Not Having Sex for Money

Video.summary: Dytazia wants to know if her mother tried to sell her for drugs; a young boy dies while in the care of a relative; Kristie wants to know who her biological father is.
Video.title: Did My Mom Try To Sell Me For Drugs?

Image.alt: Did My Mom Try To Sell Me For Drugs?
Did My Mom Try To Sell Me For Drugs?
Did My Mom Try To Sell Me For Drugs?

Video.summary: Hannah is tired of Nick's crazy accusations, hacking into her computer and texting her friends pretending to be her. Then, Nicole says she's never cheated on her husband Robert. She also claims that the constant accusations caused her to miscarry.
Video.title: You Beat Them Up, What If They Pass?

Image.alt: You Beat Them Up, What If They Pass?
You Beat Them Up, What If They Pass?
You Beat Them Up, What If They Pass?

Video.summary: David believes his wife Shamonda is cheating on him and that she might be having sex for money! Plus, Matt believes that his girlfriend is a prostitute. She admits she has accepted money and gifts from men, but swears she gave nothing in return.
Video.title: I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute

Image.alt: I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute
I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute
I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute

Video.summary: Lisa has had all six of her children REMOVED from her home as a result of neglect and abuse which she still tries to justify.
Video.title: I Lost 6 of My Kids

Image.alt: I Lost 6 of My Kids
I Lost 6 of My Kids
I Lost 6 of My Kids

Video.summary: A year ago, Jessica confessed to violently shaking her infant son and causing him severe brain injuries. But now Jessica has recanted and claims that a sippy cup caused his injuries. Be sure to tune in to hear the truth!
Video.title: If You Didn't Shake Your Son, Why Did You Confess?

Image.alt: If You Didn't Shake Your Son, Why Did You Confess?
If You Didn't Shake Your Son, Why Did You Confess?
If You Didn't Shake Your Son, Why Did You Confess?

Video.summary: Ritchie received a video that appeared to be of his longtime girlfriend having sex with someone else; Jason's sister-in-law says he tried to seduce her.
Video.title: I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?

Image.alt: I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?
I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?
I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?

Video.summary: Loretta and Joseph have been together for 2 years and have a young son together. She says that when she was pregnant, he punched and pulled her hair. She claims that she’s been faithful but Joseph isn’t convinced. Who’s telling the truth?
Video.title: Abuse, Prostitution, DNA...And A Retest

Image.alt: Abuse, Prostitution, DNA...And A Retest
Abuse, Prostitution, DNA...And A Retest
Abuse, Prostitution, DNA...And A Retest

Video.summary: Steve will put Brittany’s sister Jami and boyfriend Luis to the lie detector test to find out if Luis coerced Jami into having sex. Then, did Cassandra sleep with her husband Greg’s brother Collin? Is Collin their child’s father? Find out today!
Video.title: Betrayed By My Family?

Image.alt: Betrayed By My Family?
Betrayed By My Family?
Betrayed By My Family?

Video.summary: Sex addict Princess wants to confess to her fiance about her secret double life.
Video.title: I Need to Tell Him I Cheated 71 Times

Image.alt: I Need to Tell Him I Cheated 71 Times
I Need to Tell Him I Cheated 71 Times
I Need to Tell Him I Cheated 71 Times

Video.summary: There is nothing more serious than allegations of child abuse, but when all the testimonies are laid out, the stories just don't add up. Steve has the lie detector results and will reveal the truth once and for all.
Video.title: I Don't Believe Your Story

Image.alt: I Don't Believe Your Story
I Don't Believe Your Story
I Don't Believe Your Story

Video.summary: A couple's children are taken away after the six-month-old nearly dies from having a baby wipe lodged in her windpipe; Shawn says his daughter came home with severe bruising on her body after staying with her mother and told him her mother beat her.
Video.title: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him

Image.alt: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him

Video.summary: A woman whose fiancé tried to strangle her still believes he is a good guy; a teen who has lived a life of crime finds her younger sister following in her footsteps and wants to stop her.
Video.title: Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence

Image.alt: Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence
Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence
Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence

Video.summary: Marvin believes that Ieasha, with whom he had a fling, is trying to pin her toddler on him; married Savannah fears that her baby girl belongs to her ex-boyfriend; Alexis, furious that her ex would question the paternity of their son, wants revenge.
Video.title: I Can't Be The Father, She Was Already Pregnant

Image.alt: I Can't Be The Father, She Was Already Pregnant
I Can't Be The Father, She Was Already Pregnant
I Can't Be The Father, She Was Already Pregnant

Video.summary: In order to avoid charges, Christi abandons her ten year old daughter and leaves the state. Her daughter wants to give her one last chance to take responsibility and be in her life.
Video.title: Mommy, Go To Jail For Me

Image.alt: Mommy, Go To Jail For Me
Mommy, Go To Jail For Me
Mommy, Go To Jail For Me

Video.summary: Melissa suspects that her long-distance boyfriend is not real, but is a false persona created by her best friend; a text message from a stranger informs Beverly that her husband is posting on numerous websites to cheat on her.
Video.title: Catfished!

Video.summary: Grace wants to expose ex-boyfriend Kenny for destroying her teen years and denying their child. Then, Kendra suspects boyfriend Brandon is cheating on her with his ex Monique, and she thinks he has the STD to prove it!
Video.title: You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?

Image.alt: You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?
You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?
You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?

Video.summary: When this young man says that he'd kill his own mother if the gang asked him to, Steve decides to hold an intervention. With the help of an ex-gang member, they try to speak some truth into this gangster from suburbia.
Video.title: Steve's Gang Intervention

Image.alt: Steve's Gang Intervention
Steve's Gang Intervention
Steve's Gang Intervention

Video.summary: Angel claims that her father Ronald abused her sexually, forced her to do drugs and even got her addicted to crack when she was 18. His other daughter Tracy also claims he’s tried to abuse her several times, but Ronald says he’s innocent!
Video.title: Devil Dad

Image.alt: Devil Dad
Devil Dad
Devil Dad

Video.summary: Eric finally won custody of her daughter and suspects his ex Brittney of neglecting her! He suspects Brittney’s boyfriend Freddy of molesting her and knows that his daughter tested positive for meth! But what will the lie detector results reveal?
Video.title: This Child Was Living in Hell

Image.alt: This Child Was Living in Hell
This Child Was Living in Hell
This Child Was Living in Hell

Video.summary: Dakia accuses her sister of stealing $12,000 worth of jewelry from her home; Dante believes his brother-in-law stole $2,000 from a friend.
Video.title: Did You Steal From Your Own Family?

Image.alt: Did You Steal From Your Own Family?
Did You Steal From Your Own Family?
Did You Steal From Your Own Family?

Video.summary: Re'Nae and Candice think their sister stole a wallet and expensive jewelry from them; O.J. and Jasmine are accused of stealing money from the aunt who took them in when they were desperate.
Video.title: Is There A Thief In My Family?

Image.alt: Is There A Thief In My Family?
Is There A Thief In My Family?
Is There A Thief In My Family?

Video.summary: After living apart, Anthony believes Harley cheated on him with at least one of her male roommates and abuses her. Then, Dana fears her son Jamel is abusing his girlfriend and grandkid’s mother, Katrina. Can Steve help these violent men?
Video.title: Abused Teens Choose a Door

Image.alt: Abused Teens Choose a Door
Abused Teens Choose a Door
Abused Teens Choose a Door

Video.summary: Chamira left her family for prostitution, but then she sent her sister Latoya a pornographic video featuring minors. Emily received calls claiming that her fiancé Kevin was cheating on her and selling drugs. What will the lie detector tests say?
Video.title: Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family

Image.alt: Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family
Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family
Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family

Video.summary: Jackie and her children live with a registered sex offender; accused of touching his own son, Ronnie takes a lie-detector test and demands a DNA test too.
Video.title: You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids

Image.alt: You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids
You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids
You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids

Video.summary: Sheila fears that her teen grand-daughter is having sex with a 26-year old family-friend. Then, Jaquella started dating her boyfriend Shaquille when he was a teen. Shaquille's mother is here to confront Jaquella for sleeping with her child.
Video.title: Why Are You Dating A Child?

Image.alt: Why Are You Dating A Child?
Why Are You Dating A Child?
Why Are You Dating A Child?

Video.summary: Recaps of several stories that involve deplorable acts committed against children.
Video.title: Voice of the Victims

Image.alt: Voice of the Victims
Voice of the Victims
Voice of the Victims

Video.summary: Taylor and Joseph admit to getting into violent arguments where he slapped, choked, scratched and even threw objects at her, but agree that if they can prove neither cheated, then their violent streak will end. But will it end?
Video.title: I'm Not Sorry I Beat Her

Image.alt: I'm Not Sorry I Beat Her
I'm Not Sorry I Beat Her
I'm Not Sorry I Beat Her

Video.summary: A young child suffered serious life-threatening injuries, but not only is the mother Jessica considered a suspect, but her boyfriend Major and grandma Crystal are also under investigation! Find out the jaw dropping truth today!
Video.title: 3 Suspects Tested...Who Beat This Baby?

Image.alt: 3 Suspects Tested...Who Beat This Baby?
3 Suspects Tested...Who Beat This Baby?
3 Suspects Tested...Who Beat This Baby?
